Container.Name: nvim-server
Container.Overview: Self-contained web Neovim. Runs a single Neovim instance (AstroNvim config) inside the container and serves it to your browser on one port. Mount your git-managed Neovim config at /config/nvim and a persistent data volume at /data for plugins and LSP tools. No external services required. Put a reverse proxy in front for auth/TLS.
Container.Description: Self-contained web Neovim (AstroNvim) in a single container. Configurable web port and volumes; manage the config volume with git yourself.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Host port for the Neovim web UI.

Config.Name: Neovim Config
Config.Description: Your Neovim config directory (e.g. your dotfiles' nvim/.config/nvim). Manage git here yourself.

Config.Name: Data
Config.Description: Persistent data: plugins, Mason LSP/tools, treesitter parsers, state. Survives restarts.

Config.Name: WEB_PORT
Config.Description: Port the web server binds inside the container. Match this to the container side of the WebUI Port mapping.
